name: Sculpted Faux Shearling Accent Chair Cream - Threshold™ designed with Studio McGee: Tufted, Rubberwood Legs, Upholstered
description:
Bring luxurious charm and standout style to your seating collection with the Sculpted Faux Shearling Accent Chair from Threshold™ designed with Studio McGee. This cream accent chair features a sculpted design with curved back and tufted style for an eye-catching look. The wooden legs complement the look and makes this faux-shearling chair a stunning addition to your living room, study area or any other spot.

Overall Height: 31 inches
Overall Width: 26.75 inches
Overall Depth: 30 inches
Seat Height: 17.25 inches
Seat Thickness: 9.25 inches
Seat Depth: 23.75 inches
Seat Width: 26.75 inches
